name: Pineapple Limeade
recipeIngredient: 3 cups sodium- and calorie-free sparkling water -- chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Extract juice from the pineapple (about 2 cups) and limes (about 1/4 cup) using a juice extractor.
2. Mix the extracted juices and sugar in a pitcher until well combined.
3. Refrigerate the mixture until chilled.
4. Just before serving, stir in the sparkling water.
5. Serve over ice. Garnish with lime slices if desired.
6 servings
